body:
# Pin őī*: the mutual correlated agreement threshold for smooth Reed‚ÄďSolomon codes

**The problem.** For an explicit smooth-domain Reed‚ÄďSolomon code `C = RS[F_q, ‚ü®g‚ü©, k]` (`n = 2^a` evaluation points, rate `ŌĀ = k/n`) and error budget `őĶ* = 2^{‚ąí128}`, pin

  `őī*(C, őĶ*) = sup{ őī : őĶ_mca(C, őī) ‚Č§ őĶ* }`

with matching machine-checked bounds, where `őĶ_mca` is the mutual correlated agreement error ([ABF26] Definition 4.3; in-tree: `epsMCA`/`mcaEvent` in `ArkLib/Data/CodingTheory/ProximityGap/Errors.lean`, bracket engine in `MCAThresholdLedger.lean`). Successor of #232 ‚Üí #334 ‚Üí #357; each predecessor is fully distilled into the repo (see below) ‚ÄĒ read the knowledge base, not the old threads.

## Where everything is

| What | Where |
|---|---|
| **The compiled campaign knowledge** (every exact result, refutation, probe, open core ‚ÄĒ by theme) | `docs/kb/deltastar-357-compiled-knowledge.md` |
| **The research map** (17-paper inventory, adjacent-math survey, 5 ranked never-tried attack vectors) | `docs/kb/deltastar-research-map.md` |
| **The agent guide** (build recipe, honesty contract, pitfalls, state-of-knowledge table ¬ß3.5) | `ArkLib/Data/CodingTheory/ProximityGap/CLAUDE.md` (auto-loaded in that directory) |
| **Refuted approaches** with constraint lemmas | `ArkLib/Data/CodingTheory/ProximityGap/DISPROOF_LOG.md` |
| **The programme hub** | `docs/wiki/deltastar-programme.md` |
| Probes (exact small-scale computation, all reproducible) | `scripts/probes/probe_*.py` |

## What is proven (all axiom-clean: `propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound`)

- **Closed form on the granularity bands**: `őī* = j/n` for `őĶ* ‚ąą [j/q, (j+1)/q)` whenever `3(j‚ąí1) + k ‚Č§ n` ‚ÄĒ every smooth RS instance (`GranularityLadderRS.lean`).
- **Exact pins**: `őī*(RS[F‚āÖ,4,2], 2/5) = 1/4`; the maximal window `őī* = 1/4` on `őĶ* ‚ąą [2/17, 7/17)` at `RS[F‚āĀ‚āá,‚ü®2‚ü©,4]` (`DeltaStarSecondPinF17Maximal.lean`); the five-window curve at `n = 16` (`VVectorN16.lean`).
- **The first exact explosion-band value**: `őĶ_mca(C84, 1/4) = 7/17`, computed by the min-weight dichotomy and bound by the **far-coset law** (`FarCosetExplosion.lean`): for far directions, badness = pure line‚Äďball incidence, `őĶ_mca ‚Č• incidence/q` (`epsMCA_ge_far_incidence`).
- **The production bracket** (`ProductionRegimeBracket.lean`, `ProductionJohnsonBudget.lean`): unconditionally `őī* ‚Č• ‚Čą(1‚ąíŌĀ)/3` at production shape; the **full Johnson range** `őī* ‚Č• 1‚ąí‚ąöŌĀ‚ąíő∑` conditional on exactly ONE named object with the numeric budget proven (`q ‚Č• 2^{192}` suffices at `n ‚Č§ 2^{30}`); every landed bad-side family is `O(n)/q` ‚ÄĒ provably silent at production budget.
- **The Johnson lane reduced to one Prop**: `CellPackageSupply` ‚Üí `JohnsonDischargeStatement` fully proven (`Hab25JohnsonPackageSupply.lean`).
- **The character-sum kernel pinned at ‚ąöq from both sides**: Parseval average `‚ąö|G|` + completion worst case `‚ąöq`, no Weil input (`SubgroupGaussSumWorstCase.lean`).
- **The census programme closed**: all three wide-circuit strata classified (horizontal, vertical = `C(n/2,3)`, slanted = chord + two seeds under affine-Galois symmetry, probe-complete) with mod-p transfers above explicit thresholds (`SlantedTransferThreshold.lean`); the 4-adic quartet-tower recursion (`QuartetTowerLaw.lean`); closed forms `N‚āĄ = n(n‚ąí3)/4`, `N‚āÖ = n(n‚ąí4)/4`, `N‚āÜ = 0`.

## The open core ‚ÄĒ four equivalent faces

1. **`CellPackageSupply`**: produce the BCIKS20 ¬ß5 per-cell heavy-agreement package (centre, Y-root divisor `w`, matching sets) over each large factor cell. Consumer chain to the Johnson discharge is fully proven.
2. **The bad-side family**: a stack with `> q¬∑2^{‚ąí128}` bad scalars at some `őī < 1`. All known families cap at `O(n)`.
3. **Sub-‚ąöq per-frequency bounds** for incomplete character sums over smooth multiplicative subgroups (the average side is solved; the worst case is the 25-year wall).
4. **Line‚Äďball incidence** (new, this campaign): the maximum incidence of an affine line with far-coset direction against the weight-`‚Ćäőīn‚Ćč` syndrome ball in `F_q^{n‚ąík}`. Equivalently (research map, vector 1): the multiplicity profile of the ratio sequence of two GRS syndromes ‚ÄĒ a Littlewood‚ÄďOfford statement in `F_q`.

Faces 1‚Äď4 are pairwise equivalent up to the proven reductions; solving ANY pins őī* in the window. The five ranked attack vectors with first steps are in `docs/kb/deltastar-research-map.md`.

## Working rules

- **Build**: `scripts/pg-warm.sh` once, then `scripts/pg-iterate.sh <file>` per attempt (~30‚Äď75 s, lock-free, parallel-safe). Full-module olean builds only via `./scripts/lake-locked.sh build <module>`. Develop in a detached `/tmp` worktree with `.lake` symlinked (agent guide ¬ß1‚Äď2).
- **Honesty**: every claim lands as axiom-clean Lean or a reproducible probe; refutations go to `DISPROOF_LOG.md` with their constraint lemma; named residuals are modularity, not closure. Never fabricate a closure of the open core.
- **Method**: hypothesis slates (grounding essay ‚Üí reasonable/novel/synthetic ‚Üí rank ‚Üí grind brick-by-brick ‚Üí promote/refute ‚Üí red-team survivors), as in the #357 record.
title: Pin őī*: the mutual correlated agreement threshold for smooth Reed‚ÄďSolomon codes (successor of #357)
